'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 12''' is the twelfth issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Issue 12 was published in Summer [[1990]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Features===
*"Clive Revill: Fan Club Exclusive" by [[Desiré Gonzales]]
*"''Maniac Mansion'' Special" by [[Dan Madsen]]
*"New Movie Update: ''Red Tails''"
*"Denholm Elliot: ''The Last Crusade'' of Marcus Brody" by Dan Madsen
*"Inside [[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM]]: ''Back to the Future Part II''" by [[John S. Davis]]
*"Countdown to Ten" cartoon by [[R. Tomasic]]
